titles.title: The Love of God (Abounds in Me)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I think of the goodness in my life I'm soul rejoice to You my Lord How wonderful How wonderful Your love for me I'm so blessed to have it now

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The love of God abounds in me I'm so glad He saved me He died for me, He died for me On the cross of Calvary Just to let me know, just to let me know His love for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And now I'm fully convinced that God really loves me And even though the whole world turn their back to me I know His love will be mine forever
